flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lone Star College System rose 54% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.2k → $3.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lone Star College System rose 52% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.2k → $9.4k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Lone Star College System fell 28% between 2017 and 2020 (66.9% → 48.2%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Lone Star College System rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (17.9% → 21.1%).
